description: ITERATION-2 / resolution completeness: DeepLabV3+ + MobileViT-XS at 256x256 (companion to 005 @ 512). Same 10-epoch / batch-8 / Adam-1e-3 / plain-CE recipe. Tests whether the hybrid CNN+transformer encoder follows the MNv3-S resolution-peak pattern or the MNv4-S monotone-up pattern at low resolution.
